selection_method: Static code audit for mobile viewport/responsive setup, touch/pointer/tap-friendly controls, mobile-web-app metadata, and avoiding likely desktop/keyboard-only controls. This is not a physical-device playtest.

selected_games.name: Bad Ice Cream 3
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport, Apple mobile-web-app tags, and bundled virtual joystick/mobile touch overlay code.

selected_games.name: Candy Crush
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and explicit touch/pointer input handling.

selected_games.name: Capybara Clicker
selected_games.reason: Has a device-width viewport and tap/click gameplay style suitable for phones.

selected_games.name: Flappy Bird
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and explicit touchstart/touchend/touchmove support.

selected_games.name: FNAF
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and tap/click-style launcher/game surface.

selected_games.name: FNAF 2
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and tap/click-style launcher/game surface.

selected_games.name: FNAF 3
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and tap/click-style launcher/game surface.

selected_games.name: FNAF 4
selected_games.reason: Has a mobile viewport and explicit touch events/mobile-friendly control code.

selected_games.name: Minesweeper
selected_games.reason: Has a device-width viewport and tap/click board controls.

selected_games.name: Noob Miner
selected_games.reason: Has a locked mobile viewport and tap/click canvas gameplay.

selected_games.name: Table Tennis World Tour
selected_games.reason: Has Apple mobile-web-app support, mobile viewport metadata, and mobile/environment detection.

selected_games.name: They Are Coming
selected_games.reason: Has a device-width mobile viewport, touch/pointer focus handling, and mobile-device CSS switching.

selected_games.name: Tiny Fishing
selected_games.reason: Has a locked mobile viewport and Apple mobile-web-app tags; gameplay is tap/click friendly.

selected_games.name: Zombie Rush
selected_games.reason: Has a locked mobile viewport and touch-action disabled on the game canvas/body for touch play.

run_instructions: Open index.html in a browser, or upload this whole folder to GitHub Pages/any static host and open index.html. The game HTML files are in games/ and are mostly self-contained.
